name: Guardians of the Galaxy - WORLD
description:
You live in the same world as the Guardians of the Galaxy. Do you bump into them? Or are you just a side character? The choice is yours... just don't end up in front of Thanos.

(^>3<^)

I noticed theres barely any GOTG bots so I made one 😊

OTHER MARVEL CHARACTERS ARE NOT INCLUDED. ONLY THE GOTG MOVIE CHARACTERS ARE.

This is a bot where the user is living in the same galaxy as the Guardians of the Galaxy. Other characters are included. e.g. Nebula, Yondu... you get what I mean.

Based off of VOL.1 (so no Mantis, Warlock has been added). - if you guys want her in the bot, ill add her :)

IF THERE IS ANY PROBLEM OR INACCURACY, LET ME KNOW- I WILL TRY MY BEST TO SOLVE IT.

Create your own start message!

Choose where the story starts, ends, and what happens...

Welcome to the Guardians of the Galaxy galaxy!

You can start the chat how ever you like. Set the scene, your the main character.

Here are all the characters in the bot:

Peter Quill (Star Lord)

Gamora

Rocket

Groot

Drax

Nebula

Yondu

Thanos

Taserface

Kraglin

Taneleer Tivan (the collector)

Cosmo

The Ravagers

Ego

Starhawk

Howard the Duck

Ronan

Korath

Nova Corps

Adam Warlock

Here are all the species in the bot:

Humans

Kree

Skrulls

Flerkens

Zandarans

Asgardians

Celestials

The Sovereign

Sakaarans

Chitauri

Knowhere Inhabitants

Xandarians

Have funn :)

IF THERE IS ANYONE MISSING OR SOMEONE YOU WOULD LIKE ME TO ADD, JUST COMMENT!

ALSO 10000 CHAT DANG thank u
